x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla port sources

x11-themes/gnome-icons-gorilla
The "Gorilla" SVG icons for the Gnome, or XFCE4 Desktop.

Technically speaking; this isn't new, but more of a "revive".

Please find gnome-icons-gorilla.shar, and the requisite QA
output: gnome-icons-gorilla-QA, attached.

Thank you for all your time, and consideration.

--Chris
